boundary: This report checks cloud artifacts and summarizes phase metrics. It does not authorize RTX speedup claims; claims require human/AI review of correctness, phase separation, hardware metadata, and comparison baselines.
git_head:
fatal: not a git repository (or any parent up to mount point /)
Stopping at filesystem boundary (GIT_DISCOVERY_ACROSS_FILESYSTEM not set).

rows.baseline_review_contract_claim_limit: outlier threshold-count or DBSCAN core-count summary only; not row-returning neighbors or full DBSCAN cluster expansion
rows.baseline_review_contract_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count/core-count result with identical radius, threshold, fixture, and copies
rows.claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count traversal only
rows.cloud_contract_claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count traversal only
rows.cloud_contract_non_claim: not per-point outlier labels, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, anomaly-system, row-output, or whole-app RTX speedup
rows.non_claim: not per-point outlier labels, row-output neighbors, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, anomaly-detection-system, or whole-app RTX speedup claim

rows.baseline_review_contract_claim_limit: outlier threshold-count or DBSCAN core-count summary only; not row-returning neighbors or full DBSCAN cluster expansion
rows.baseline_review_contract_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar threshold-count/core-count result with identical radius, threshold, fixture, and copies
rows.claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar core-count traversal only
rows.cloud_contract_claim_scope: prepared fixed-radius scalar core-count traversal only
rows.cloud_contract_non_claim: not per-point core flags, not full DBSCAN clustering, cluster expansion, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, or whole-app RTX speedup
rows.non_claim: not per-point core flags, not a full DBSCAN clustering, KNN, Hausdorff, ANN, Barnes-Hut, or whole-app RTX speedup claim
